title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Threat Case: Skill Directory
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext skill directory increment in a valid focused agent skill. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
